description_long: This is a modern bungalow set within a lush, landscaped plot surrounded by dense greenery and shrubbery. The main structure features a flat, dark roof and large windows, with a clean, rectangular footprint. A paved driveway leads up to the house, and a prominent hexagonal glass gazebo or conservatory sits in the front yard. The property is enclosed by a white picket fence, and the garden is meticulously arranged with a mix of trees, bushes, and flowering plants. The house appears to have a single story and a minimalist, contemporary design. The overall setting suggests a private, suburban residence with a focus on outdoor living and visual harmony with nature.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped garden featuring a glass gazebo and dense greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and the hexagonal glass gazebo prominently in the landscaped yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, the driveway, and the extensive greenery along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bungalow, dense tree coverage, and the continuation of the garden layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the glass gazebo, picket fence, and the side facade of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
